title: potentilla × collina subsp. alpicola
intro: Potentilla × collina subsp. alpicola, also known as alpine cinquefoil, is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of alpine cinquefoil include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Alpine cinquefoil can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
